violations.text: The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2025
Inspector observed a 3 bay apparatus within a 1 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 06/18/2025
